prevented_failure_purpose: Prevent a test file from authorizing validation unless file/field identities, units, timing, testbench/model bindings, per-signal depth, mappings, and project gaps are complete and current.

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Current governed test files and hashes
Current required fields, units, and timing identities
Current per-signal mappings, depth, and project gaps

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against file or field identity is missing
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: a governed test file or required field is absent, stale, duplicated, or misidentified
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against unit or timing contract mismatches
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: field units, timestamps, step, duration, or temporal semantics are inconsistent
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against testbench or model binding is wrong

prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against per-signal evidence is shallow
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: required signal depth or mapping evidence is missing or inadequate
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against project-level gap is hidden
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: a current project evidence gap is omitted from the contract result
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

claim_boundary: This guard-model proof blocks only candidate admission when declared target-native obligation evidence is missing or native-failed. It does not independently detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, workflow, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
